description: Convert a directory of scientific PDFs to Markdown with YAML front matter, filename-derived metadata (author/year/title), and an optional INDEX.md + catalog.json.
rules: read-only inputs; writes Markdown + catalog into record_store/literature
INPUT_DIR must be an existing directory containing PDFs
ORGANIZE_BY_YEAR=1 nests output into year subdirectories
requires the markitdown Python library to actually convert
usage: Set INPUT_DIR (dir of PDFs). Optional ORGANIZE_BY_YEAR=1, CREATE_INDEX=1, RECURSIVE=1. Output: literature/ dir + convert_literature_summary.json.
limitation: Needs the markitdown library installed; without it the porter records a structured 'lib missing' note. Filename metadata uses the Author_Year_Title.pdf convention. No network.
